title: Main Wind Force Resisting System Procedures
description: Permitted procedures for determining MWFRS wind loads

data.rule: Wind loads for the MWFRS shall be determined using one of the specified procedures
data.then: Use one of: 1) Directional Procedure (Chapter 27), 2) Envelope Procedure for low-rise (Chapter 28), 3) Directional Procedure for appurtenances (Chapter 29), or 4) Wind Tunnel Procedure (Chapter 31)
